utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. Checking the final package: (1) destination – included and fully specified (Ljubljana, Slovenia). (2) travel_dates – included and specific (October 25–29, 2024). (3) transportation – includes flight details (airline, type, route, cost) and meets the requirement. (4) accommodation – hotel name, type, nights, cost per night, total cost – fully covered. (5) activities – list of 4 activities with names and costs – fully covered. (6) additional_services – includes local transport and meals with costs – fully covered. (7) total_budget – includes breakdown of costs and remaining budget – fully covered. All 7 items are present and properly specified.
